mapper.update: update alarm_tbl set alarm_check = 1 where member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: select * from alarm_tbl where alarm_del = 1 and member_id = #{memberId}
select count(alarm_check) from alarm_tbl where alarm_check=0 and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: update alarm_tbl set alarm_check = 1 where member_id = #{memberId}
update alarm_tbl set alarm_del = 0 where alarm_no = #{alarmNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
update alarm_tbl set alarm_del = 0 where member_id = #{memberId}
